name: Pilze in Sahnesosse (Mushrooms in Cream Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean mushrooms and slice in half if large.
2. Pat dry the mushrooms.
3. Fry bacon in a large pan until lightly browned. Remove and reserve the bacon.
4. Add butter to the pan drippings.
5. Add onions; saute until lightly browned.
6. Add mushrooms; cook until tender, stirring often.
7. Stir in wine, salt, pepper, paprika, nutmeg, and mace.
8. Cover the pan and cook over low heat for 15 minutes.
9. Remove from heat. Add cooked bacon, cream, and lemon juice.
10. Reheat until just warm.
11. Garnish with parsley and serve with noodles or dumplings.
